Presidential Action in Effect onOctober 11, 1962, , , provided that:Pub. L. 87–794, title II, § 257(e)(2)76 Stat. 882Oct. 11, 1962“Action taken by the President under section 5 of such Act [former ] and in effect on the date of the enactment of this Act [] shall be considered as having been taken by the President under section 231 [].”section 1362 of this titlesection 1861 of this titleOct. 11, 1962

Continuation of Investigations, , , provided that:Pub. L. 87–794, title II, § 257(e)(3)76 Stat. 882Oct. 11, 1962“Any investigation by the Tariff Commission [now the United States International Trade Commission] under section 7 of such Act [former ] which is in progress on the date of the enactment of this Act [] shall be continued under section 301 [] as if the application by the interested party were a petition under such section for tariff adjustment under section 351 []. For purposes of section 301(f) [], such petition shall be treated as having been filed on the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 1364 of this titlesection 1901 of this titlesection 1981 of this titlesection 1901(f) of this titleOct. 11, 1962Oct. 11, 1962
